title: Crimson (disambiguation)
content:
'''Crimson''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
===Callsigns===
*'''[[Crimson Leader]]''', a [[Resistance]] callsign
*'''[[Crimson Specialist]]'''

===Individuals===
*'''[[Crimson Jack]]''', a [[human]] [[pirate]]
*'''[[Sidon Ithano]]''', a [[Delphidian]] pirate known as the '''Crimson Corsair'''
*[[Jod Na Nawood]], a human pirate also known as Crimson Jack

===Organizations===
*'''[[Crimson Dawn]]''', a crime syndicate

===Vehicles===
*'''''[[Crimson Bolt]]''''', a [[racing skiff]]
*'''''[[Crimson Firehawk]]''''', a [[shuttle]]
*[[Crimson Squadron]]'s [[MG-100 StarFortress SF-17]] [[bomber]]s:
**'''''[[Crimson Bolide]]'''''
**'''''[[Crimson Cutter]]'''''
**'''''[[Crimson Dancer]]'''''
**'''''[[Crimson Hailstorm]]'''''
**'''''[[Crimson Smiter]]'''''

===Other===
*'''[[Crimson Pavane]]''', a [[fathier]]
*The '''[[Crimson Star]]''', a [[Galactic Empire]] award

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''Crimson''', an alias of '''[[Celia Durasha]]'''
*'''[[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]]''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]

===Locations===
*The '''[[Crimson Casino]]''', a [[Casino/Legends|casino]] on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]]
*The '''[[Crimson Corridor]]''', a high-crime district in the [[Third Quadrant]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Zi-Kree Sector]]
*The '''[[Crimson Flare]]''', a quadrant of the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]
*'''[[Crimson Road]]''' on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]
*'''[[Crimson Redrum]]''', a barroom in the [[Quarek'k]] complex on Coruscant
*The '''[[Crimson Talon]]''', an area in the [[Karthakk system]]

===Organizations===
====Criminal organizations====
*The '''[[Crimson Brotherhood]]'''
*The '''[[Crimson Fang]]''', a [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] criminal gang
*The '''[[Crimson Kreehawks]]''', a gang
*The '''[[Crimson Nova]]''', a chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]
*The '''[[Crimson Stars]]''', a pirate gang

====Military and mercenary units====
*The '''[[Crimson Aces]]''', a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] unit
*The '''[[Crimson Command]]''', a large flotilla of [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] serving under "[[High Admiral]]" [[Treuten Teradoc]]
*The '''[[Crimson Condottiere]]s''', a group of Xim's [[war-robot]]s equipped with [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] components
*'''[[Crimson Fury]]''', a flight of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]]

====Other====
*'''[[Crimson Empire]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial remnant]] led by [[Carnor Jax]]

===Starships===
*The '''''[[Crimson Axe]]''''', [[Rav]]'s [[Starship/Legends|starship]]
*The '''''[[Crimson Fleece]]''''', [[Hylo Visz]]'s starship
*The '''''[[Crimson Sword]]''''', a [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]]

===Vehicles===
*The '''[[Crimson Claw]]''', a [[Hoverbike/Legends|hoverbike]] model
*The '''[[Crimson Skull]]''', a hoverbike model
*The '''[[Crimson Talon (walker)|Crimson Talon]]''', a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]]

===Other===
*The '''[[Crimson Days]]''', a conflict in the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]]
*The '''[[Crimson Forever]]''', a [[Disease/Legends|disease]]
*The '''[[Crimson Prowler Lightsaber]]'''
*The '''[[Crimson Prowler Lightsaber Crystal]]'''
*'''[[Crimson Prowler gear]]'''
*'''[[Crimson Rush]]''', a [[kirgatz]] hand
*'''[[Crimson slug]]s''', vacuum-dwelling predators

==Real world==
===Canon media===
*'''''[[Star Wars: Crimson Reign]]''''', a comic book miniseries published by [[Marvel Comics]]

===Legends media===
*'''''[[Crimson Bounty]]''''', a short story co-written by [[Charlene Newcomb]] and [[Rich Handley]]
*'''''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]''''', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic metaseries]] published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]
**'''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire (comic series)|''Star Wars: Crimson Empire'']]
**'''''[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire III—Empire Lost]]'''''
**'''[[Crimson Empire (audio)|''Crimson Empire'']]''', an audio play adaptation of the comic series
*'''''[[Crimson Jailbreak]]''''', a story by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]]

==See also==
*[[Crimson Squadron (disambiguation)]]

{{Disambig}}
